name: vault-keeper
description: Marketplace exposing claude-code-vault-keeper — generic, config-driven knowledge-vault tooling (LSP diagnostics server + CLI validator + shared markdown parsing lib). Any vault can `claude marketplace add <this-repo>` then install the plugin; the vault supplies its own templates/ with validation_rules and an optional .claude/vault-keeper.json.

plugins.name: claude-code-vault-keeper
plugins.description: Generic knowledge-vault tooling for Claude Code — per-keystroke LSP diagnostics + navigation + hover + completion + code-action + code-lens + inlay-hint + rename + document-formatting, a full-vault CLI validator (vault-keeper-validate), and a shared body/template parsing lib. Vault-agnostic via optional .claude/vault-keeper.json (defaults: whole repo is the vault). The consuming vault brings its own templates/ — this plugin ships none.
